title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Saksoft

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Saksoft
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Saksoft. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About Saksoft:
Saksoft is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft!
